## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital) and Mara Leighton to discuss potential job opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/9zYSP4aZsQh2YtuU_Z-aJtTt19SzPimg?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital is a fast-growing startup that raised $12M Series A, hitting $6M revenue from zero](https://fathom.video/share/9zYSP4aZsQh2YtuU_Z-aJtTt19SzPimg?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Company uses AI workflows to automate content creation processes, with editors in the loop](https://fathom.video/share/9zYSP4aZsQh2YtuU_Z-aJtTt19SzPimg?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [Seeking to hire managing editors/growth strategists to lead client accounts and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/9zYSP4aZsQh2YtuU_Z-aJtTt19SzPimg?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Mara's background aligns well with their needs; comp range of $150-175k discussed](https://fathom.video/share/9zYSP4aZsQh2YtuU_Z-aJtTt19SzPimg?tab=summary&timestamp=1765.0)

## Topics

### Company Background and Growth

  - [Founded by Marcel Santilli, who has background building content hubs/publications at large tech companies](https://fathom.video/share/9zYSP4aZsQh2YtuU_Z-aJtTt19SzPimg?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Recently raised $12M Series A funding](https://fathom.video/share/9zYSP4aZsQh2YtuU_Z-aJtTt19SzPimg?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [Hit $6M in revenue from zero, growing rapidly](https://fathom.video/share/9zYSP4aZsQh2YtuU_Z-aJtTt19SzPimg?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [Hiring aggressively, especially engineers and managing editors](https://fathom.video/share/9zYSP4aZsQh2YtuU_Z-aJtTt19SzPimg?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)

### Product and Technology

  - [Built proprietary AI workflow platform to automate content creation processes](https://fathom.video/share/9zYSP4aZsQh2YtuU_Z-aJtTt19SzPimg?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [Uses coding agents and runtime layer to execute complex workflows](https://fathom.video/share/9zYSP4aZsQh2YtuU_Z-aJtTt19SzPimg?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Example: Research workflow breaks topic into questions, finds 20-30 sources per question, filters/processes content](https://fathom.video/share/9zYSP4aZsQh2YtuU_Z-aJtTt19SzPimg?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
  - [Editors involved throughout to guide strategy and quality](https://fathom.video/share/9zYSP4aZsQh2YtuU_Z-aJtTt19SzPimg?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)

### Team Structure and Roles

  - [Organized into pods led by managing directors (former CMOs/VPs of Growth)](https://fathom.video/share/9zYSP4aZsQh2YtuU_Z-aJtTt19SzPimg?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Managing editors lead 3-5 client accounts each, overseeing mini-teams](https://fathom.video/share/9zYSP4aZsQh2YtuU_Z-aJtTt19SzPimg?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
  - [Everyone acts as product manager, giving feedback to engineering](https://fathom.video/share/9zYSP4aZsQh2YtuU_Z-aJtTt19SzPimg?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
  - [Hiring for client operations, strategy, and other roles to support growth](https://fathom.video/share/9zYSP4aZsQh2YtuU_Z-aJtTt19SzPimg?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)

### Mara's Current Role

  - [Manages 19 client accounts at Verbatim](https://fathom.video/share/9zYSP4aZsQh2YtuU_Z-aJtTt19SzPimg?tab=summary&timestamp=1433.0)
  - [Weekly schedule includes internal strategy, client calls, customer interviews](https://fathom.video/share/9zYSP4aZsQh2YtuU_Z-aJtTt19SzPimg?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)
  - [Handles relationship management, content strategy, team capacity planning](https://fathom.video/share/9zYSP4aZsQh2YtuU_Z-aJtTt19SzPimg?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)

### Potential Fit and Next Steps

  - [Marcel sees strong alignment between Mara's background and managing editor role](https://fathom.video/share/9zYSP4aZsQh2YtuU_Z-aJtTt19SzPimg?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
  - [Discussed comp range of $150-175k salary](https://fathom.video/share/9zYSP4aZsQh2YtuU_Z-aJtTt19SzPimg?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)
  - [Marcel to arrange intros to Chief of Staff and other team members](https://fathom.video/share/9zYSP4aZsQh2YtuU_Z-aJtTt19SzPimg?tab=summary&timestamp=1888.0)
  - [Can move quickly on hiring process if interested](https://fathom.video/share/9zYSP4aZsQh2YtuU_Z-aJtTt19SzPimg?tab=summary&timestamp=1916.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to have team reach out to schedule follow-up conversations with other fwd.digital team members](https://fathom.video/share/9zYSP4aZsQh2YtuU_Z-aJtTt19SzPimg?tab=summary&timestamp=1926.0)
  - [Mara to consider opportunity and prepare questions for next discussions](https://fathom.video/share/9zYSP4aZsQh2YtuU_Z-aJtTt19SzPimg?tab=summary&timestamp=1916.0)
  - [Both to find time for more in-depth conversation about role and company](https://fathom.video/share/9zYSP4aZsQh2YtuU_Z-aJtTt19SzPimg?tab=summary&timestamp=1916.0)
